name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something that would make HermitStash more useful
title: ""

---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or frustration that led to this idea.

**What would you like?**
A clear description of what you'd want to happen.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds you're currently using, or other approaches that could work.

**Additional context**
Anything else — screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
